title: cortia striata
intro: Cortia striata is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cortia striata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and cold symptoms, and soothe digestive problems. Cortia striata can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
